case_title: MENG XUE LI VS. OSCAR DEPREE WISEMAN, JR.

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER MARK P. SCHREIBER FILED BY LI, MENG XUE WISEMAN, JR., OSCAR DEPREE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LI, MENG XUE AS TO DEFENDANT WISEMAN, JR., OSCAR DEPREE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF LI, MENG XUE ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS, (W/AUTHORIZATION LETTER FROM PLAINTIFF FOR RELEASE OF EXHIBITS)
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, MENG XUE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-29-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED APR-16-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WISEMAN, JR., OSCAR DEPREE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, MENG XUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WISEMAN, JR., OSCAR DEPREE $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,060.00, THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF'S TOTAL DAMAGES ATTRIBUTABLE TO THE ACCIDENT TO BE $4000.00 AND ATTRIBUTES ALL OF THE FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT TO THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
POWER OF ATTORNEY FILED BY PLTF AUTHORIZING DR. SHE GUAN WANG (FATHER) TO REPRESENT HER IN HER LAWSUIT AGAINST DEFT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WISEMAN, JR., OSCAR DEPREE
